summary: Iteration 13: Agent API System Testing - All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for Developer API page.

details: GET /api/admin/api-keys - Lists all API keys for tenant with available_permissions
POST /api/admin/api-keys - Creates new API key with custom permissions, rate limit, expiry
DELETE /api/admin/api-keys/{id} - Revokes API key (sets is_active=false)
Returns full key only on creation (one-time display)
Requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
GET /api/v1/agent/scout - Primary handshake endpoint
Returns tenant info, permissions, rate_limit, available endpoints
Requires valid API key (401 without auth)
Rejects invalid API keys (401)
GET /api/v1/agent/visitors - Returns new members in manifest schema
Supports days and limit query parameters
Returns visitor_report with timestamp, new_members array, total_count
Requires members:read permission
GET /api/v1/agent/members - Returns member directory
Supports search, outreach_status, limit, offset parameters
Returns members array with unique_id, name, email, outreach_status
Requires members:read permission
GET /api/v1/agent/events - Returns upcoming events
Supports upcoming_only and limit parameters
Returns events array with unique_id, title, start_time, registration_count
Requires events:read permission
GET /api/v1/agent/groups - Returns groups with member counts
Returns groups array with unique_id, name, member_count, is_open
Requires groups:read permission
GET /api/v1/agent/meetings - Returns pastoral meetings
Returns meetings array with member_name, topic, status, has_summary, has_transcript
Requires meetings:read permission
GET /api/v1/agent/giving/summary - Aggregate stats only (no individual amounts)
Returns total_unique_donors, donors_this_month, first_time_givers_this_month
Includes security note about no individual amounts exposed
Requires giving:read permission (test key correctly denied with 403)
GET /api/v1/agent/notes - Returns leadership notes
Requires notes:read permission (test key correctly denied with 403)
GET /api/v1/agent/docs - Public endpoint (no auth required)
Returns complete API documentation with endpoints, permissions, params
Includes authentication instructions and example header format
Developer API page renders at /developer
Quick Start Guide with 3 steps: Create Key, Test Connection, Connect Agent
View API Documentation link points to /api/v1/agent/docs
Your API Keys section lists all keys with status, permissions, usage
Create API Key button opens modal with name, permissions, rate limit, expiry
Active keys show Revoke button
All data-testid attributes present for testing
API key with members:read,events:read,groups:read,meetings:read works for those endpoints
Same key correctly denied (403) for giving:read and notes:read endpoints
Permission check includes wildcard support (e.g., members:* covers all)

critical_code_review_comments: API key system properly implemented with secure hash storage (SHA256)
Full key shown only once on creation - cannot be retrieved later
Permission enforcement working correctly with fine-grained scopes
Public /v1/agent/docs endpoint correctly requires no authentication
Rate limiting structure in place (1000/hr default) - production should use Redis
Anomaly detection/circuit breaker threshold defined for new_visitors_per_day
Giving summary is read-only with no individual amounts exposed - good security
MOCKED: Teams/Slack notifications (notify_meeting_event returns mocked responses)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_agent_api_iter13.py - New comprehensive test suite for Agent API

test_credentials.api_key_note: MoltBot Test Key - lacks giving:read and notes:read permissions

seed_data_creation: None - using existing API key created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent API system fully functional. All /v1/agent/* endpoints working with proper permission enforcement. The test API key (MoltBot Test Key) has limited permissions - it lacks giving:read and notes:read, so tests for those endpoints correctly verify 403 denial. To test giving:read and notes:read endpoints successfully, create a new API key with those permissions via /admin/api-keys POST endpoint. The /v1/agent/docs endpoint is public and requires no authentication. Developer API page UI at /developer is fully functional with Quick Start Guide, API key listing, and create modal.

mocked_apis_list: notify_meeting_event - Returns mocked Teams/Slack notification responses
